sqlMap.select: select count(defaultgroupname) from vm_defaultgroup where defaultgroupname = #defaultgroupname#
sqlMap.update: update vm_defaultgroup set defaultgroupmember = #member# where defaultgroupname = #deptName#
sqlMap.insert: insert into vm_defaultgroup(id, creator, createdate, defaultgroupname, defaultgroupmember, defaulttype) values(#id#,util_user.getMemIdByLoginName('flowbot'), trunc(sysdate),#departName#, #member#, util_common.getEnumIdByRefName('默认组类型',#groupType#))
sqlMap.select: select id from org_member where id in (select source_id from org_relationship where objective0_id = #id# and objective2_id is not null) and status = 1 and is_enable = 1 and code is not null
select id, name from org_unit where type = 'Department' and IS_DELETED = 0 and status = 1 and is_internal = 1
